name: Puff Oven Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in each of two 9-inch pie plates in the oven.
3. In a blender, combine eggs, milk, and pancake mix. Pour batter into pie plates.
4. Bake about 18 minutes, until pancakes are puffy and browned. Do not open the oven while pancakes are cooking.
5. Spoon raspberries on top of each warm Puff Oven Pancake. Top with drained pineapple chunks and sliced banana.
6. Sprinkle brown sugar over top. Top with sour cream. Alternatively, sprinkle lemon juice over top of each warm Puff Oven Pancake.
7. Sprinkle powdered sugar over top. Serve immediately.
